package rulecoverage

func NegativeJsonMarshalThenWrite() string {
    ruleID := "json_marshal_then_write"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`data, _ := json.Marshal(v); w.Write(data)` when `json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(v)` would stream directly"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
